name: Claude 1
tagline: Anthropic's first publicly released Claude model.
metaDescription: Claude 1 (Anthropic), released 2023-03-14 — part of the Claude (legacy 1–2.x) line. Anthropic's first publicly released Claude model.
overview: Claude 1 is a large language model from Anthropic, part of the Claude (legacy 1–2.x) line. Released 2023-03-14. Anthropic's pre-Claude-3 models, including the original Claude and the low-latency Claude Instant; all retired.
What's notable in this version: Anthropic's first publicly released Claude model.
